zh.lifeSummary: 當Morgan ap Dafydd於大約1375年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾育斯特拉德費爾特時，他的父親Dafydd Ap Gwilym18歲，母親Gwenlian Verch Phillip22歲。他於1402年與Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他埋葬在威爾士安格萊利安法斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morgan ap Dafydd于大约1375年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾育斯特拉德費爾特时，他的父亲Dafydd Ap Gwilym18岁，母亲Gwenlian Verch Phillip22岁。他于1402年与Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他埋葬在威尔士安格萊利安法斯。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Morgan ap Dafydd was born about 1375, in Ystradfellte, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, was 18 and his mother, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, was 22. He married Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl in 1402, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. He was buried in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morgan ap Dafydd est né environ 1375, à Ystradfellte, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl en 1402, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Ilenterré à Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morgan ap Dafydd um 1375 in Ystradfellte, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dafydd Ap Gwilym 18 und seine Mutter Gwenlian Verch Phillip 22. Er hat 1402 in Wales, United Kingdom Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er wurde in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Dafyddが約1375年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアイストラドフエルトで生まれた時，父Dafydd Ap Gwilymは18歳，母Gwenlian Verch Phillipは22歳であった。1402年にイギリスウェールズでTangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwlと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はウェールズアングレセイランファスにて埋葬された。

ko.Llansantffraid Glan Conwy, Conwy, Clwyd,: 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랜산프레이드 글런 콘w이
ko.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Dafydd(이)가 대략 1375년 웨일스 브레콘실르 이스트래드프트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dafydd Ap Gwilym(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenlian Verch Phillip(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1402년 영국 웨일스에서 Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 웨일스 앤글레시 랜파이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morgan ap Dafydd nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Ystradfellte, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, tinha 22 anos. ru.Llansantffraid Glan Conwy, Conwy, Clwyd,: ллансанффреид глан конви, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morgan ap Dafydd родился около 1375 г. в местности истрадфеллт, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Dafydd Ap Gwilym было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenlian Verch Phillip, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl в 1402 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности лланфаесь, англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Morgan ap Dafydd nació aproximadamente 1375, en Ystradfellte, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Tangwystl Verch Maredudd Bwl en 1402, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Fue sepultado en Llanfaes, Isla Oscura, Gales.
